issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple leads, with HubSpot confirming issues with associations and filters. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve it.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Automated SMS messages not sending for pre-referral leads
issues.desc: Multiple leads across MRC and lender channels were not receiving automated SMS messages as part of pre-referral workflows, with the last confirmed SMS observed around January 30, 2026. The issue was suspected to be a product-level integration problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Madelaine filed a ticket with the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually reach out via SMS to any leads created between January 30 and February 11, 2026 who did not receive automated SMS contact attempts.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not properly excluding these terminal deal stages as unenrollment criteria. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on March 9 to resolve it.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks for deals currently marked as Closed Lost or Transferred that were generated during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference and display the previous LO's information rather than the updated LO. The issue was identified on a specific deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed the prior LO Paul. Luis resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify that outbound agent emails reflect the correct current loan officer.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed after a contract fall-through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage Offer Accepted was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria on March 16 to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted between the original impact period and March 16, 2026 to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling into TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks and closing info collection was not being initiated. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be resolved after a support interaction on April 1. The root cause was not explicitly disclosed by HubSpot.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1, 2026 into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
